meta.title: Quarterly planning — engineering priorities
meta.subtitle: Draft for leadership review · not approval-gated

sections.title: Summary
sections.body_markdown:
This **generic** layout uses the same **ReportPayload** shell as named report kinds: sections carry **markdown** bodies and optional **charts**. Use it when your narrative does not map cleanly to **team-weekly**, **sprint-summary**, etc.

**Focus next quarter:** reliability investments (**SLO** burn reduction), **developer velocity** (CI + templates), and **security** baseline (**SSDF** checklist).

sections.title: Priority themes
sections.body_markdown:
| Theme | Why now | Success signal |
|-------|---------|----------------|
| Reliability | Burn alerts trending up | Error budget green **4** weeks straight |
| Velocity | Onboarding time high | **TTHW** median **−30%** |
| Security | Audit findings aging | **0** critical older than **90d** |

sections.title: Illustrative allocation
sections.body_markdown: Example **doughnut** chart for stakeholder scans — swap for **bar** or **line** when trends matter more than mix.
